title: Remote mobile device interacting with multiple remote systems
abstract: Systems, methods and apparatus for creating, analyzing and updating a property inventory are disclosed which include receiving, from a user operating a mobile device, a request to add a new item of property to an insurance inventory associated with an insurance policy, the request including information identifying the new item, at least a first image of the new item, and information identifying a location of the new item. An insurance inventory system is operated to add the new item to an insurance inventory associated with the insurance policy, the updating including computing a total current value of the insurance inventory including the new item. A coverage engine is operated to compare coverage limits associated with the insurance policy to the total current value of the insurance inventory to determine if the total current value is within a coverage limit of the insurance policy. A response is transmitted to the user based on the determination.
claims: 1. A computer system, comprising: a mobile device application download system, storing, for download to a mobile device, an application program which configures mobile devices to: capture a first image of a first item; generate a user interface prompting for data relating to the first item; capture, via a camera of the mobile device, an image of one or more of a bar code, serial number or product code of the first item; communicate with one or more comparison services to obtain, independent of purchase transaction data for the first item, comparative pricing information associated with the first item employing the one or more of a bar code, serial number or product code; communicate with one or more other services to provide proof of ownership of the first item; and automatically transmit a request to add the first item to an inventory and a record including the captured image data, data entered via the user interface, location information automatically captured via a GPS receiver of the mobile device, time information, the image of the one or more of a bar code, serial number or product code of the first item, and the obtained comparative pricing information; the application program being further configured to, responsive to receipt of a response to a request to add an item, automatically display the received response on an interface of the mobile device; a computer processor, in communication with a data storage device, for executing program instructions; a memory, coupled to the computer processor, storing program instructions for execution by the computer processor to: receive, from the mobile device, the transmitted request and the transmitted record including the captured image data, data entered via the user interface, location information automatically captured via a GPS receiver of the mobile device, time information, the image of the one or more of a bar code, serial number or product code of the first item, and the obtained comparative pricing information; responsive to receipt of the transmitted request and the transmitted record including the captured image data, data entered via the user interface, location information automatically captured via a GPS receiver of the mobile device, time information, the image of the one or more of a bar code, serial number or product code of the first item, and the obtained comparative pricing information, include the first item in a property inventory of items covered under an insurance policy having coverage for items at a specified location; receive, subsequent to receipt of the transmitted request and the transmitted record, claim information relating to a loss affecting the first item; and responsive to receipt of the claim information relating to a loss affecting the first item, perform, based on receipt of the transmitted record, modified claim processing comprising at least one of: expediting processing of the claim relating to the loss affecting the first item as compared to claim processing timing relating to items for which the transmitted record has not been received; and processing the claim relating to the loss affecting the first item with claim processing requirements reduced as compared to claim processing requirements relating to items for which a transmitted record has not been received; wherein the location information automatically captured via a GPS receiver of the mobile device contained in the transmitted record is compared to the specified location to verify coverage.
